elements.title: lang::report_page_077_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT t.*,
       kbi_u.firstname,
       kbi_u.lastname,
       kbi_u.email,
       kbi_u.idnumber,
       kbi_u.id               AS user_id,
       kbi_s.name,
       kbi_c.fullname,
       kbi_cmc.completionstate,
       kbi_cmc.timemodified   AS completiondate,
       round(sg.score, 0) AS score,
       l.timespend        AS timespend_on_course,
       ue.status          AS enrol_status,
       kbi_s.completionscorerequired,
       kbi_s.completionstatusrequired,
       kbi_s.completionstatusallscos,
       kbi_s.id               AS scorm_id,
       sg.finalgrade,
       sg.rawgrademax,
       kbi_cm.completionexpected,
       kbi_cm.completiongradeitemnumber,
       kbi_cm.completionview,
       kbi_cm.completion,
       kbi_s.grademethod      AS scorm_grade_method,
       l.visits           AS visits_on_course,
       ue.timeend,
       ''                 as cohortname
FROM mdl_scorm kbi_s
       JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_s.course
       JOIN mdl_modules kbi_m ON kbi_m.name = 'scorm'
       JOIN mdl_course_modules kbi_cm ON kbi_cm.module = kbi_m.id AND kbi_cm.instance = kbi_s.id
       JOIN (SELECT kbi_e.courseid, kbi_ue1.userid, MIN(kbi_ue1.status) AS status, MIN(kbi_ue1.timeend) AS timeend
             FROM mdl_enrol kbi_e
                    JOIN mdl_user_enrolments kbi_ue1 ON kbi_ue1.enrolid = kbi_e.id
             WHERE kbi_e.id > 0
               AND kbi_e.courseid = :courseid
             GROUP BY kbi_e.courseid, kbi_ue1.userid) ue ON ue.courseid = kbi_c.id
       JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = ue.userid
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT courseid,
                         userid,
                         SUM(timespend) AS timespend,
                         SUM(visits)    AS visits
                  FROM mdl_local_kopere_bi_tracking
                  GROUP BY courseid, userid) l ON l.courseid = kbi_c.id AND l.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT MIN(kbi_sst.id)                                                              AS id,
                         kbi_sst.userid,
                         kbi_sst.scormid,
                         MAX(kbi_sst.timemodified)                                                    AS timemodified,
                         MIN(CASE WHEN kbi_sst.element = 'x.start.time' THEN kbi_sst.value ELSE null END) AS starttime,
                         SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(CASE
                                           WHEN kbi_sst.element = 'cmi.core.total_time'
                                                   THEN kbi_sst.value
                                           WHEN kbi_sst.element = 'cmi.total_time'
                                                   THEN (CASE
                                                           WHEN kbi_sst.value LIKE 'PT%H%M%.%S'
                                                                   THEN STR_TO_DATE(kbi_sst.value, 'PT%HH%iM%kbi_s.%fS')
                                                           WHEN kbi_sst.value LIKE 'PT%H%M%S'
                                                                   THEN STR_TO_DATE(kbi_sst.value, 'PT%HH%iM%sS')
                                                           WHEN kbi_sst.value LIKE 'PT%M%.%S'
                                                                   THEN STR_TO_DATE(kbi_sst.value, 'PT%iM%kbi_s.%fS')
                                                           WHEN kbi_sst.value LIKE 'PT%M%S'
                                                                   THEN STR_TO_DATE(kbi_sst.value, 'PT%iM%sS')
                                                           WHEN kbi_sst.value LIKE 'PT%.%S'
                                                                   THEN STR_TO_DATE(kbi_sst.value, 'PT%kbi_s.%fS')
                                                           WHEN kbi_sst.value LIKE 'PT%S'
                                                                   THEN STR_TO_DATE(kbi_sst.value, 'PT%sS')
                                 END)
                                           ELSE NULL END))                                        AS duration,
                         GROUP_CONCAT(CASE
                                        WHEN kbi_sst.attempt = 1 AND
                                             kbi_sst.element IN ('cmi.completion_status', 'cmi.core.lesson_status') AND
                                             kbi_sst.value IN ('completed', 'passed') THEN 'lang::report_sql_status_completed::local_kopere_bi'
                                        ELSE '' END SEPARATOR
                                      '')                                                         AS first_completion_status,
                         GROUP_CONCAT(CASE
                                        WHEN kbi_sst.attempt = la.last_attempt_number AND
                                             kbi_sst.element IN ('cmi.completion_status', 'cmi.core.lesson_status') AND
                                             kbi_sst.value IN ('completed', 'passed')
                                                THEN 'lang::report_sql_status_completed::local_kopere_bi'
                                        ELSE ''
                                          END SEPARATOR
                                      '')                                                         AS current_completion_status,
                         COUNT(DISTINCT(kbi_sst.attempt))                                             as attempts
                  FROM mdl_scorm_scoes_track kbi_sst
                         JOIN mdl_scorm kbi_s1 ON kbi_s1.id = kbi_sst.scormid
                         JOIN (SELECT userid, scormid, MAX(attempt) AS last_attempt_number
                               FROM mdl_scorm_scoes_track
                               GROUP BY userid, scormid) la ON la.userid = kbi_sst.userid AND la.scormid = kbi_sst.scormid
                  WHERE kbi_sst.id > 0
                    AND kbi_s1.course = :courseid
                  GROUP BY kbi_sst.userid, kbi_sst.scormid) t ON t.scormid = kbi_s.id AND t.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_modules_completion kbi_cmc ON kbi_cmc.coursemoduleid = kbi_cm.id AND kbi_cmc.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_gi.iteminstance,
                         ROUND((CASE
                                  WHEN kbi_g.rawgrademax > 0 THEN (kbi_g.finalgrade / kbi_g.rawgrademax) * 100
                                  ELSE kbi_g.finalgrade END), 0) AS score,
                         kbi_g.userid,
                         kbi_g.finalgrade,
                         kbi_g.rawgrademax
                  FROM mdl_grade_items kbi_gi, mdl_grade_grades kbi_g
                  WHERE kbi_gi.itemmodule = 'scorm'
                    and kbi_g.itemid = kbi_gi.id
                    AND kbi_g.finalgrade IS NOT NULL
                    AND kbi_gi.outcomeid IS NULL
                  GROUP BY kbi_gi.iteminstance, kbi_g.userid, kbi_g.rawgrademax, kbi_g.finalgrade, kbi_gi.scaleid, kbi_g.feedback, kbi_gi.gradetype,
                           kbi_g.rawgrademin, kbi_gi.courseid) sg ON sg.iteminstance = t.scormid and sg.userid = t.userid
WHERE ue.userid > 0
  AND kbi_c.id = :courseid
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
  AND kbi_cm.visible = 1
ORDER BY kbi_c.fullname, kbi_s.name, kbi_u.lastname, kbi_u.firstname
